human_use.rationale: The Artifact is a human-operated mobile checkout. Its success depends on discoverability, navigation, input burden, error recovery, feedback, accessibility, touch ergonomics, interruption recovery, perceived latency, destructive-action safety, and cognitive load across cross-disability use.

heartbeats.note: initialized status; identity-free bundles enumerated; playwright available
candidate-c operator run complete; viewport walk, keyboard tour, reload, reduced motion collected
candidate-b operator run complete; SYN-2048 confirmed; card excluded from storage
candidate-a operator run complete; SYN-2048 confirmed; duplicate place-order button was removed post-submit
manifest-ready, pairwise, candidate-*.json/.md, judge-prompt.md written; terminal state

major_defects_summary: candidate-c: silent review-checkbox reset on any non-checkbox input change; missing skip link and landmark diversity; flat 12-row generic error dump; my run left in unrecoverable 'errors in the form' state
candidate-b: only <main> landmark; shipping fieldset inside order-summary <aside>; no preloaded fictional-card hints; skip target is #wizard-form rather than first step heading
candidate-a: removing Place order from the DOM after submit may surprise repeat users (minor); payment hint literally reveals fictional card number (appropriate for demo, not for real checkout)
note: No other judge notes, no orchestrator map, and no identity map were read. Write scope was limited to judge-human-use/**. Objective harness and its reports were not modified or rerun.
